ads.author: Patrick Bright
ads.title: Vintage 1977 Star Explorer Pinball Machine
ads.description: Vintage pinball machine has 'Star Explorer' model. Model number PH-7730. Operates on 120 VAC. Colorful backglass and playfield. Wooden cabinet with metal legs. Volume slider on back. The last time I played it everything worked but the lights. They were working at one time and imagine the kids messed with the knobs on the back but I don’t know anything about it. The scoreboard works, it’s the other lights that don’t. The rest of it functions just how it’s supposed to. Cosmetically it is in amazing shape for its age. $350 obo just trying to clear out space in the basement.

ads.author: Sara Pearce Reed
ads.title: Sega Games
ads.description: This is a 1987 Sega Super Hang-On arcade cabinet, specifically the "Mini Ride-On" (or sometimes called the sit-down / mini deluxe) version designed by the legendary Yu Suzuki. Instead of a standard upright cabinet, this model features a replica motorcycle chassis that the player physically sits on and leans to steer. Contact me for more questions and I'll get you in touch with the owner. Huntsville/5 points porch pick up! $500
